initial_draft:
The current proposal from RED is to give me 50 dollars. Since I have nothing to offer, I can only accept or reject. Accepting this proposal seems fair, as it splits the initial 100 dollars equally. Rejecting would mean both of us lose everything, which is not beneficial.
